code: this.globalObj = { tokens: this.tokenMover.tokens, getTokenByName: function (name) { return this.tokens.find((token) => token.name === name); }, returnTrue: function () { return true; }, firstSymbolIsA: function (token) { const word = token && token.chars && typeof token.chars.word === 'string' ? token.chars.word : ''; return word.length > 0 && word[0] === 'a'; }, firstSymbolIsB: function (token) { const word = token && token.chars && typeof token.chars.word === 'string' ? token.chars.word : ''; return word.length > 0 && word[0] === 'b'; }, wordIsEmpty: function (token) { const word = token && token.chars && typeof token.chars.word === 'string' ? token.chars.word : ''; return word.length === 0; }, consumeFirstSymbol: function (token) { const word = token && token.chars && typeof token.chars.word === 'string' ? token.chars.word : ''; if (word.length > 0) { token.chars.word = word.substring(1); } }, splitOnZ2: function (token) { return true; } }
